creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #4)
> Is this PR still relevant?

Yes, though the original patch has rotted.  I've been using a different patch for a while, but have recently run into other issues with it.

The importance of this to me has declined a lot recently because I've pretty much given up on upgrading ports in place and switched to poudriere.
